nasb.text: Because of the voice of the enemy, Because of the pressure of the wicked; For they bring down trouble upon me And in anger they bear a grudge against me.

esv.text: because of the noise of the enemy, because of the oppression of the wicked. For they drop trouble upon me, and in anger they bear a grudge against me.

cnv.text: 這都是由於仇敵的聲音， 和惡人的欺壓； 因為他們使禍患臨到我的身上， 怒氣沖沖地迫害我。

ccb.text: 仇敌向我咆哮， 恶人迫害我。 他们带给我苦难， 怒气冲冲地辱骂我。

csbs.text: 这是因仇敌的声音、因恶人压迫的缘故； 是的，他们使坏事落在我身上， 并在怒气中逼迫我。
